summary: Iteration 21 - Herion Practice Flow Refactor Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Pre-practice Understanding Gate with mandatory explanation screen before starting practice, (2) 6-Step Practice Flow (Comprendiâ†’Caricaâ†’Elaboraâ†’Verificaâ†’Firmaâ†’Completa), (3) Document Clarity System with clear categories (Da caricare, Ricevuto, Generato da Herion, Richiede firma, Firmato p7m), (4) Expanded Practice Status Semantics (16 statuses mapped to 8 user-facing categories), (5) Official Channel / Entity-Aware Practice Layer showing entity name, submission method, portal link, who submits, authentication needed. All UI text is in Italian. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Understanding Gate correctly displays: 'Prima di iniziare' header, practice explanation, required documents, how-it-works steps, destination entity, and 'Inizia la pratica' CTA
6-step progress bar correctly shows: Comprendiâ†’Caricaâ†’Elaboraâ†’Verificaâ†’Firmaâ†’Completa with proper step highlighting based on status
POST /api/practices/{id}/start correctly transitions draft to waiting_user_documents
POST /api/practices/{id}/mark-submitted correctly transitions ready_for_submission to submitted_manually
POST /api/practices/{id}/mark-completed correctly transitions submitted practices to completed
GET /api/practices/{id} returns enriched data: catalog_info, channel_info, current_step, user_status
Status labels updated: 'Non iniziata' instead of 'Bozza' in user-facing UI
Dashboard shows 'Verifica' button for waiting_user_review practices
Document Section shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' labels
Channel Card displays entity name, submission method, portal link, and who-submits info
seed_data_creation: Created test practices with TEST_ prefix for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested the major practice flow refactor. Key features verified: (1) Understanding Gate: Shows 'Prima di iniziare' header, 'Cos'Ă¨ questa pratica' explanation, 'Documenti necessari' list, 'Come funziona' 4-step flow, 'Destinazione' entity info, 'Inizia la pratica' CTA button. (2) 6-Step Progress Bar: Comprendiâ†’Caricaâ†’Elaboraâ†’Verificaâ†’Firmaâ†’Completa with proper highlighting. (3) New endpoints: POST /start (draftâ†’waiting_user_documents), POST /mark-submitted (ready_for_submissionâ†’submitted_manually), POST /mark-completed (submittedâ†’completed). (4) Enriched practice response: catalog_info, channel_info, current_step, user_status. (5) Status labels: 'Non iniziata' for draft, 'In attesa dei tuoi documenti' for waiting_user_documents. (6) Document Section: Shows 'Da caricare' labels for missing docs. (7) Channel Card: Shows entity name, submission method, portal link, who-submits. (8) Dashboard: 'Verifica' button for waiting_user_review practices. All tests passed.
